thag2.30:1.1: Men of integrity have been attended to,
thag2.30:1.3: Having listened, I followed the straight way,
thag2.30:2.1: Passion for becoming, having been killed by me,
thag2.30:2.2: no further such passion is found in me.
thag2.30:2.3: It neither was nor will be
thag2.30:2.4: nor is found in me even now.
